hero.tagline: Chant with Purpose. Write with Devotion.
hero.desc: A sacred digital companion that helps practitioners count, write, and deepen their mantra sadhana through voice, handwriting, and mindful practice.

meaning.calligraphyQuote: Where the spoken word meets the written vow.
meaning.title: Two timeless paths, one practice
meaning.vachikaRoot: Derived from the Sanskrit root "Vāc" — the spoken word, sacred speech.
meaning.lekhiniRoot: Derived from the Sanskrit root "Likh" — to write, to inscribe with intent.
meaning.conclusion: Together, Vachika Lekhini unites the two timeless paths of mantra practice — spoken devotion and written devotion.

practice.title: Choose how your devotion flows
practice.intro: Voice, hand, or stillness — every path of japa, honoured and counted.
voicePoints: Your voice never leaves the device
manualPoints: Tap to count, breath by breath

features.title: Everything a devotee needs
features.intro: A complete sadhana companion — crafted with the care of a temple and the precision of modern technology.

items.title: Goal-Based Sadhana
items.desc: Set daily, monthly, or lifetime mantra goals and watch devotion compound.

items.title: Streaks & Milestones
items.desc: Build unbroken discipline with streaks and sacred milestone rewards.

items.title: Family Profiles
items.desc: One device, many devotees — each with their own private journey.

items.title: Global Sadhanas
items.desc: Join collective chanting movements happening across the world.

items.title: Practice Circle
items.desc: A community of devotees walking the path alongside you.

items.title: Daily Reminders
items.desc: Gentle, mindful nudges that keep your practice steady.

items.title: Sruthi Ambience
items.desc: Immersive tanpura and temple soundscapes for deeper focus.

items.title: Share Your Journey
items.desc: Celebrate milestones with beautiful, shareable cards.

items.title: Rewards Store
items.desc: Turn earned points into meaningful spiritual rewards.

mantras.title: A mandala of sacred intentions
mantras.intro: Eight gateways of devotion. Hover a petal to reveal its purpose.

cats.name: Wealth & Prosperity
cats.desc: Invoke Lakshmi and Kubera for abundance, fortune, and sustained prosperity.

cats.name: Peace & Calm
cats.desc: Still the restless mind and settle into serene, unshakeable inner peace.

cats.name: Healing
cats.desc: Mantras of restoration for body, mind, and spirit — vitality renewed.

cats.name: Protection
cats.desc: Surround yourself with a shield of divine grace against all adversity.

cats.name: Strength & Courage
cats.desc: Awaken inner power, fearlessness, and the resolve to face any trial.

cats.name: Spiritual Liberation
cats.desc: Mantras that loosen worldly bonds and turn the soul toward freedom.

cats.name: Wisdom & Enlightenment
cats.desc: Illuminate the intellect with clarity, knowledge, and higher understanding.

cats.name: Devotion
cats.desc: Deepen pure love and surrender at the feet of the Divine.

dashboard.title: Watch devotion become a discipline
dashboard.intro: Every chant counted, every streak honoured, every milestone a celebration.

languages.title: Pray in your mother tongue
languages.intro: Sacred sound knows no single script. Practice across India's many languages — in the words closest to your heart.

movement.title: Where devotion meets technology
movement.intro1: For centuries, devotees have chanted the Divine Names of Bhagavan Sri Rama — seeking peace, strength, devotion, and spiritual growth. Today, we begin a new journey.
movement.intro2: Vachika Lekhini is being created to help devotees chant, count, track, and contribute their Nama Japa from anywhere in the world.
movement.everyChant: Whether you chant one Nama or one lakh Namas, every chant matters.

pillars.title: Chant Anytime
pillars.desc: From anywhere in the world, your practice is always within reach.

pillars.title: Track Your Nama Japa
pillars.desc: Every count preserved — whether one Nama or one lakh.

pillars.title: Join a Global Community
pillars.desc: Chant alongside devotees united by the Divine Name.

pillars.title: Be Part of Something Eternal
pillars.desc: A movement that outlives us all.

movement.closing: This is more than an app. It is a movement dedicated to spreading the Divine Name and bringing devotees together through collective chanting.
movement.beginning: And this is only the beginning…

privacy.title: Your Practice Belongs To You
privacy.desc: Devotion is sacred and private. Everything happens on your device — nothing is uploaded, tracked, or sold. Ever.

about.desc: Building technology that serves India's spiritual and cultural heritage with respect, privacy, and care. Vachika Lekhini is our offering to every devotee who walks the path of the sacred name.
about.tagline: Where ancient devotion meets modern craftsmanship.

cta.title: Begin Your Sacred Journey
cta.subtext: Transform daily chanting into a lifelong practice of devotion, discipline, and inner growth.

footer.tagline: Chant with Purpose · Write with Devotion · Track with Pride.
